title: gnaphalium contortum
intro: Gnaphalium contortum, also known as contorted cudweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Gnaphalium contortum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infection, making it a popular choice for treating minor skin irritations and injuries. Gnaphalium contortum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
